data.title: How Shivon Zilis Operated as Elon Musk’s OpenAI Insider

content.basic: Messages presented at trial reveal how Zilis, the mother of four of Musk’s children, acted as an intermediary between him and OpenAI.

data.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet

content.basic: Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.
